title: IBC Amendment Act 2026: Architecture of a new insolvency order - What changes and how to structure around it [Part I]
description: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Act, 2026 is the most structurally significant reform to Indian insolvency law since the Code's enactment in 2016. Passed by the Lok Sabha on March 30 and the Rajya Sabha on April 1, 2026, the Act introduces an entirely new resolution track, legislatively extinguishes certain judicial doctrines, recalibrates the balance between secured and statutory creditors and lays the groundwork for India's first comprehensive cross-border and group insolvency f
